{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Sixfold Archmage
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator is referred to as the [[Sixfold Archmage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
